notes: #589 MERGED+LIVE (PR #591, c873c88) and #606 MERGED+LIVE (PR #607, fe3bd70) on main. #606 was a live-diagnosed bug found this session: evaluateCommandCenterCandidateGate's INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN bare-UUID clause was false-positiving on raw commitment/signal ids that hunt-anomalies.ts embedded into evidenceLines, silently killing real R1-shaped candidates pre-LLM for ~30h despite the scorer selecting real winners -- plausibly THE reason #567's first indispensable card hadn't fired. Fixed (ids dropped from evidenceLines; INTERNAL_DEBUG_PATTERN itself untouched) and merged, but NOT YET live-verified: still owner-gated -- trigger the next real pipeline run and re-query pipeline_runs.raw_extras + workday_presence_suppression_trace for 2cbc1bab-8e0e-43b0-bf4a-9a0cd6b5d91f to confirm the two previously-stuck commitment candidates (due 2026-07-05, 2026-07-07) now produce a real card. #567 resumes as the standing foundation seam pending that verification; its own remaining scope (tkg_goals re-ground, Gmail connector 1->967) is untouched by #606.
